name: DFO Rockfish Conservation Areas - simplified for web display
sourceNote: DFO RCA FeatureServer. Display layer only; verify current regulations and variation orders before fishing.

properties.name: Ajax / Achilles Bank
properties.label: RCA禁区
properties.summary: Rockfish Conservation Area：多数休闲钓鱼活动受禁或严格限制。出海前仍需核对 DFO 最新法规/Variation Order。
